changeSet.author: Víctor Cañizares

createTable.remarks: An authoring event over the coefficient timeline in supply_partition_coefficient: it groups the coefficients that were set together, against a given plant, and keeps the evidence they were derived from.

column.name: plant_id
column.remarks: The plant this agreement distributes production from.

column.name: notes
column.remarks: Free-text notes about the agreement. Optional.

column.name: status
column.remarks: DRAFT, PUBLISHED or SUPERSEDED. TEXT + CHECK rather than a native PostgreSQL ENUM: a native enum cannot have a value removed, and extending it (ALTER TYPE ... ADD VALUE) has historically been restricted inside transactions -- a poor fit for Liquibase and for a value set that will change. TEXT + CHECK is trivially alterable and reads identically.

column.name: installed_power_kw
column.remarks: A deliberate snapshot of the plant's installed power at authoring time, not a join to plants.total_power: the plant's installed power today is not the power the agreement was authored against.

column.name: created_by
column.remarks: NULL means the agreement was created by the system (a migration), not by a person -- there is no honest user id to record. Phase 2d creates exactly one such synthetic agreement to carry coefficients that predate this model. Do not backfill this with a synthetic 'system' user row: it could not authenticate, it would appear in member listings, and someone would eventually delete it.

changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE sharing_agreement ADD CONSTRAINT sharing_agreement_status_check CHECK (status IN ('DRAFT', 'PUBLISHED', 'SUPERSEDED'))
